title: Residential Epoxy Floor Coatings - Elite South Texas
content:
Residential - interior
Our interior residential flooring and surfaces offer tremendous advantages compared to conventional floor coverings. These flooring solutions are durable enough to withstand heavy foot and pet traffic, are easy to maintain and will not stain like tile, grout or carpet. Choose from unlimited patterns, textures, colors, designs and more.
Advantages
Durable, long lasting
Easy to clean and maintain
Antimicrobial and antibacterial surfaces
Slip resistant options
Stain and chemical resistant
For new or existing residences
Options for surface repair and restoration without tear out
Quick install options for minimal downtime
Virtually endless colors, patterns and other design options
Polymer Modified Cement
Basements and mancaves
Garages
